title: 3 Strange Natural Oddities

segments.text: Ever seen a lake that glows at night?
These anomalies challenge everything we think we know.
First, the Pink Lake in Australia, bright as bubblegum.
Its vivid color remains unexplained by scientists.
Next, the Sailing Stones of Death Valley, moving on their own.
These rocks leave trails, yet no one witnessed them move.
Finally, the Door to Hell in Turkmenistan, burning for decades.
Its origin as a gas crater is known, but why is it endless?
Are there more secrets hidden in our world?
Follow for mysteries we still can't explain.

description: Nature has created oddities that puzzle scientists. Follow for daily mysteries! 🔍
